episodes.title: Growing up Māori at Gloriavale: Valiant Overcomer's story | MATA Reports | RNZ
episodes.description:
At 14, Valiant Overcomer and two of his sisters fled the only world they'd ever known: Gloriavale. The Overcomers were one of the few whānau Māori in the isolated Christian community.

WATCH MATA Reports @ https://www.rnz.co.nz/video
or on YouTube here: https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PL3lS2qVBadNNd2QR6I3vZAlHQipmkvOh_

Made with the support of NZ On Air & Te Māngai Paho.
